name: an Azure vision activates the azure probe group
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "A .NET API on Azure with AKS and Cosmos DB" --classify 2>/dev/null); echo "$OUT" | ruby -rjson -e 'a=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["activated_probe_namespaces"]; exit(a.include?("azure") ? 0:1)' && echo azure-activated 1>&2
